process.commandLine: C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe /v:on /d /c "echo [MXC] Policy expectation: C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed is read/write. & echo [MXC] Attempt READ: C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\input.txt & set /p INPUT=<C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\input.txt & echo [MXC] READ RESULT: !INPUT! & echo [MXC] Attempt WRITE: C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\output-from-mxc.txt & >C:\mxc-demo-fs\allowed\output-from-mxc.txt echo written by MXC & echo [MXC] WRITE RESULT: output-from-mxc.txt created successfully."
